name: Heavy-Lift Cinematic Tuning and Flight Plan
description: You are a Drone Camera Operator. To ensure smooth movement for a heavy cinema camera, update the vehicle parameters according to the specifications in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/cinematic_tuning_specs.txt. Create a test mission that includes a takeoff, a square pattern of at least four waypoints, and a return to launch (RTL) command. Export the mission to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/cinematic_test.plan and create a confirmation file at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/tuning_signoff.txt containing the word 'cinematic'.
